query:
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.contactName,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.accountCode,
  bi.invoiceDate,
  CASE 
    WHEN bi.externalId IN ('BI00745','BI00735','BI00598','BI00618','BI00628','BI00648','BI00658','BI00668','BI00678','BI00688') THEN 'CURRENTLY_MATCHED'
    ELSE 'available'
  END AS status
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName IN (
  'Gumdale Medical Center',
  'Stafford Heights Medical Practice', 
  'Albany Family Doctors',
  'Ausdocs Carindale Pty Ltd',
  'Kawana Family Clinic',
  'Doctors at Samford Valley',
  'Coastal Dental Specialists',
  'Aspley Firstcare Doctors',
  'Warwick Medical Centre',
  'Mount Cotton Medical Centre'
)
AND bi.accountCode = '2376'
ORDER BY bi.contactName, bi.lineAmount DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.contactName,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.accountCode,
  bi.invoiceDate,
  CASE 
    WHEN bi.externalId IN ('BI00745','BI00735','BI00598','BI00618','BI00628','BI00648','BI00658','BI00668','BI00678','BI00688') THEN 'CURRENTLY_MATCHED'
    ELSE 'available'
  END AS status
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName IN (
  'Gumdale Medical Center',
  'Stafford Heights Medical Practice', 
  'Albany Family Doctors',
  'Ausdocs Carindale Pty Ltd',
  'Kawana Family Clinic',
  'Doctors at Samford Valley',
  'Coastal Dental Specialists',
  'Aspley Firstcare Doctors',
  'Warwick Medical Centre',
  'Mount Cotton Medical Centre'
)
AND bi.accountCode = '2376'
ORDER BY bi.contactName, bi.lineAmount DESC;
